texto: You are caught in the vicious cycle. You are hesitant because you are not used for things going your way. And things will never go your way because you remain hesitant. You see what you want, become hesitant, and the door of opportunity closes. It happens again. And again. And again. With each choice towards Inaction, you reject yourself a little bit more.
explicacao: Citação de Pook sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You are caught in the vicious cycle. You are hesitant because you are not used for things going y…” articula autoestima, confidence, introspection em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como introspection e opportunity.
